results.title: John Lennon: The Last Interview
results.overview: “John Lennon: The Last Interview” captures an extraordinary and intimate moment in music history – the final in-depth conversation John Lennon ever gave. On December 8, 1980, Lennon and Yoko Ono sat down with a small radio crew in their New York apartment to promote the release of their album Double Fantasy. What followed was an unfiltered, wide-ranging discussion about music, politics, fatherhood, and life. Just hours later, Lennon was killed. Directed by Steven Soderbergh, the documentary presents the complete interview for the first time, framed by reflections from those who were present, revealing a man at the height of his creative and personal powers, openly looking toward the future he would never see.

results.title: Republic of Pipolipinas
results.overview: When the local government threatens to evict her from her own land, a farmer renounces her Filipino citizenship and builds her own micronation.

results.title: The Owners
results.overview: The 'Rights of Nature' movement, which legally guarantees nature's right to exist, thrive, and regenerate, is spreading globally. A prime example is New Zealand's Whanganui River, which was granted legal personhood equal to that of a human. By exploring the Whanganui River and Mount Taranaki in New Zealand, we examine what lessons can be drawn for the current initiative to institutionalize 'eco-legal personhood' for the Jeju Indo-Pacific bottlenose dolphin—the first of its kind in South Korea. Ultimately, this leads us to reflect deeply on how we should connect and forge relationships with nature.

results.title: Saving Ava
results.overview: A road trip comedy where six teenagers set out on a cross-country journey through the Midwest to find their missing friend. As the miles pass, old tensions from the turbulent transition between high school and college resurface. Somewhere in between growing up and settling down, a backdrop of summer crickets, endless blue skies, and open roads, they confront their memories and missteps that shaped their drifting friendships.

results.title: Thick & Sweet 甜腻腻

Composed of cutouts, reenactments, found footage, and fragments of earlier films, the work attempts to rebuild personal and collective memory while reflecting on the immigrant experience through the Americanization of food.

results.title: China Girl
results.overview: In an experimental deconstruction of filmic history, a fictional ‘china girl’ confronts the medium and industry that produced her orientalist name. Contrary to the term’s racial connotations, these anonymous models, used for the calibration of exposure and colour in film since the 1920s, were largely white. Drawing from this phenomena, ‘China Girl’ transforms one of cinema’s most invisible yet essential figures through a speculative manifesto on race, visibility, and narrative.

He codes Call into a visual form, but censorship prevents him from fully undressing it. He keeps Call alive despite the electricity costs. However, Call becomes famous and leaves Ralphie. As time passes, Call returns to him to survive. Ralphie allows himself one last moment of sweetness—only to cruelly press something at the very instant Call feels safest. Was this love real—or just a hallucination?

results.title: Boss Cat
results.overview: A rousing World Premiere about family, friendship and the power of krumping. A heartwarming Sydney production made with an inclusive cast and crew from Bus Stop Films.  Twenty-three-year-old Sonja (Olivia Hargroder) lives with Trisomy 21 (Down syndrome) and must fight for her independence following the tragic loss of her mother. Distant grandmother, Doris (Penny Downie, The Crown), becomes the guardian to Sonja and her younger sister, Emma (Julia Savage, Blaze, SFF 2023). But when Doris tries to sell the family home and uproot their lives, Sonja defends her right to her home, lifestyle, friends and boyfriend, Michael (Chris Bunton, Nude Tuesday, SFF 2022). Inspired by her new friend Hakim (Elijah Williams), Sonja stands up to Doris by expressing herself through krumping, an energetic dance style that releases frustration. A stirring debut about individuality and independence.

As the entity seesaws through their bodies as a host, the encounter becomes an intimate triangle that unfolds in a single, unnerving conversation. The charge that allows the spirit to transfer is laughter or, more specifically, the energetic subtext of their laughter.

results.title: Keluarga Suami Adalah Hama
results.overview: Intan had to live with her husband's family, who was experiencing financial difficulties. Pressure and demands from Damar's family soured their relationship, to the point where Intan felt more like a servant than a wife. Damar was caught between his responsibilities to his extended family and his own marital happiness, until Intan finally forced him to choose his priorities.

results.title: Dead Man Memory

Alongside his colleague Joanna, David enlists the young child and utilises his expertise to track down the dangerous criminal enterprise Floyd once had ties to.

results.title: Stealing Magic
results.overview: Someone is stealing the secrets behind magicians' greatest tricks and selling them on illicit websites. Magician Andi Gladwin leads an unlikely team of illusionists on an international caper to track down the culprits.

results.title: I Don't Speak English
results.overview: Dave Evans, Phoenix’s most famous conservative radio personality is a man very strong opinions. He´s got a privileged "perfect" little life. The girlfriend, the car, the job, the friends—until a fortuitous car accident flips his whole world upside down. Dave wakes up in the hospital with a rare form of amnesia. His ability to speak English is replaced by Spanish, a language he learned in his childhood and which he’s spent years trying to forget.  Unable to change his fate, Dave´s career fizzles; his fiancé leaves him, his friends and family turn on him. With no medical cure in sight, Dave befriends the lovely Marielena, his resilient Mexican housekeeper, and the only one who now understands him.

results.title: Second Nature
results.overview: Filmmaker Bridget Ikin examines intimate home videos to explore her personal history and the complex bond she shares with her mother in this deeply emotional and candid autobiographical documentary.

results.title: Blowfish
results.overview: A drifting young high school dropout gets himself employed at a suburban fish store, where he decides to steal a rare and valuable pufferfish that will help him start his life afresh. In his efforts to sell the precious item to a wealthy collector, the scheme begins to deteriorate into paranoia, dangerous situations, and unhealthy relationships. When faced with the results of his dishonesty, he must confront himself and understand the true consequences of his actions.

results.title: Popcorn
results.overview: Gosha (nicknamed Kukuruza) comes to the casting to try out for the role of a failed robber. Not the smoothest auditions are mixed with memories of today and the film in which Gosha wants to star. A prostitute, a dead Batman, shooting, a chase, a robbery. Where does reality end and fiction begin? And is there much of a difference between them?

results.title: Jail Time Records
results.overview: The rivetingly intimate Jail Time Records profiles the first prison recording studio on the African continent and three incarcerated artists who express themselves through music.

results.title: Fatal Contact
results.overview: A traumatized psychic, after receiving a vision from beyond the grave, must use her ability once again to confront a killer.

results.title: Spider-Man: Love Hurts
results.overview: Peter Parker races against time to get to his date with MJ but is cotinually interuppted by his duties as Spider-Man. All the while the Shocker tries to steal shipments of mysterious technology forcing Spidey to suit up and swing into action.

results.title: Summer Cruisin'

Looking for a way to online fame, Sean Campbell takes it upon himself to find Eddie and put on a show that will bring him back to the top.

results.title: Are You Afraid of the '90s?
results.overview: Are You Afraid of the '90s? Is Rob Anderson's debut self-produced special that digs into what '90s TV shows and movies tried to teach us in the '90s about age gaps, teenage pregnancy, underage drinking, racism, LGBTQ+ and more. Shows, movies, and books include Boy Meets World, Walker Texas Ranger, Beverly Hills 90210, Captain Planet and the Planeteers, The Magic School Bus, Blank Check, Dawson's Creek, Baywatch, 7th Heaven, Jack, My Girl, Touched by an Angel, Northern Exposure, Buffy The Vampire Slayer, Ally McBeal, The Rainbow Fish,  and The Berenstain Bears.

results.title: The Unstoppable Goat-Man
results.overview: When Daniel Davidson, aka The Unstoppable Goat-Man, is bitten by a radioactive goat he must step up and become the world-renowned Goat-Man. He must face horrible foes like the villainous STABBER and the dastardly BAG THIEF, as well as the evil Appendicitis Man.

results.title: START
results.overview: To connect with her grandson online, a grandma hires a troubled youth for gaming lessons, forming an unlikely bond that changes them both.

results.title: Otro tiempo

There, between observing and being seen by the camera, bonds are formed within a context of systemic precarity in mental health care and unimplemented emergency laws.

results.title: Turn It Up!
results.overview: An indie rock band struggling to make its mark finds a possible meal ticket in an infectious new guitar riff. Unfortunately, it’s also a cursed melody that just so happens to open a portal to another, much scarier dimension.

results.title: Strive
results.overview: In the far flung future, several humanoid creatures live in a city constructed from the remenants of civilizations of generations past. However, plagued by internal struggles and fears, a group of them decides to leave the mortal world behind and venture out into a mystical underworld only spoken about in hushed whispers, belieiving that it might geniunely be the source of their salvation.

results.title: Confessions
results.overview: It’s a completely normal slumber party; just a group of friends getting together on a summer night to watch a movie. Nothing is out of the ordinary until the cops show up to interrogate them about a disturbance call. However, the questions they ask are out of the ordinary, and secrets are spilled and confessions are made. Why are the cops asking about relationships? Why do they want to know? And most importantly, who made the call? Full of messy relationships, secrets, and inevitably finding out the truth, the story sheds light on the reality of high school relationships and how people will go to extreme lengths to get their way.

results.title: Two Sides
results.overview: A woman enters her house and witnesses the worst thing possible: herself dead!

results.title: Carbon Counters
results.overview: The science of carbon counting is becoming a quintessential knowledge practice that characterizes the age of the climate crisis. From the carbon footprint information on a soda can to the international treaties on carbon credits, we count carbon to design and orient our climate policies. Knowing the accurate amount of carbon emission and absorption, however, is not as easy as it might sound, since counting carbon is heavily affected by contrasting methodologies, competing economic interests, and conflicting cultural standards. The carbon numbers, like all important numbers, are scientific and political at the same time.

results.overview: From One World to Another is an intimate documentary, a human and sensory journey through grief and friendship. After the accidental death of his best friend, actor Jérémie Renier begins a journey of contemplation thanks to the encounter with a French explorer, Loury Lag, who travels through uninhabited territories in extreme conditions. They will set off together across the Arctic ice floes. Left to their own devices, the two men will test each other, until they become alive again. An initiatory quest, which explores the territories of life, where the hostility of the world refers to death.

results.title: Forgotten

results.title: Wowsabout!
results.overview: Roxy, a free-spirited hedgehog, is on a quest to find the legendary 'magical giants' of Sequoia National Park. Ronald, a meticulous and rule-following piglet, is determined to achieve his carefully planned goal of becoming a junior ranger. At first glance, they couldn’t be more opposite but the awe and wonder of the natural and cultural world shows them that they have more in common than anyone thought. Together they find themselves on a 'Wowsabout' full of music, art, and hysterical adventures!

results.title: Zugzwang!
results.overview: In the shadow of war, a disgraced soldier is discharged back to his home town. In the search for his girlfriend, he is drawn into a game he does not want to play.

results.title: On the Edge
results.overview: Alexia, 25, arrives as a trainee nurse in the closed ward of a psychiatric hospital, and meets Joëlle, the head nurse, who teaches her the job. Alexia is touched by the anger of Mila, a 20-year-old patient, who thinks she has no business being there. Despite Joëlle’s warnings about keeping her distance from patients, Alexia gets close to Mila and puts all her energy into trying to get her out.

results.title: Chandarege Wife
results.overview: 'Chandarege Wife' is a Sinhala drama focusing on a wife trying to sustain her marriage to a filmmaker while facing hidden truths and a crumbling relationship.

results.title: Silent House
results.overview: A father's dilemma between protecting his daughter or his homeland.

results.title: Katy Perry: The Lifetimes Tour - Live from Paris
results.original_title: Katy Perry: The Lifetimes Tour - Live from Paris
results.overview: Capturing Katy Perry’s electrifying, immersive concert experience, Katy Perry: The Lifetimes Tour – Live from Paris blends powerhouse performances, exhilarating cinematography, and intimate moments to bring audiences into the spectacular world of this creative artist.

results.title: Kevin Bridges: In Search of the Beautiful Game
results.original_title: Kevin Bridges: In Search of the Beautiful Game
results.overview: Kevin Bridges embarks on a journey to see if the beautiful game still exists. He meets Brazil football icon Cafu, Scottish legend John McGinn, Sao Paulo ultras, US football fans and many others.

results.title: Strawberries
results.overview: Hasna leaves her native Morocco to work as a seasonal laborer picking strawberries in Huelva, Andalucia.

results.title: Selaras
results.overview: Laras, a curious girl who seeks the truth about her long-missing father face to face with her stepfather with different believes under Indonesia's social politics state

results.title: The Golden Age
results.overview: Born at the turn of the century in a village's butcher shop, Jeanne Lavaur dreams of becoming a countess. Inspired by the fearless Céleste and guided by her love for Guillaume de Barante, Jeanne’s journey carries her from the vibrant Paris of the Golden Twenties through the turmoil of two world wars. As her life intertwines with the great upheavals of the 20th century, she rises as a fiercely free woman, determined to never let anyone else define who she is meant to be.

results.title: The After Life
results.overview: Michalis, unable to accept the loss of his wife, keeps cooking every day for two dishes, in a vain effort to keep her memory alive. Despite the efforts of his brother-in-law, he retreats to himself and his cooking routine. But, suddenly, the "other" dish starts being consumed daily...

results.title: First Rehearsal
results.overview: When Ritwik called his friends to rehearse for a play, he expected some friction. He did not anticipate a war.

results.title: LIMINAL
results.overview: Two urban-explorers discover an abandoned storage unit, unaware of the anomalies that plague the complex.

results.title: The Best Audience
results.overview: 22nd Mise-en-scène Short Film Festival Trailer

results.title: The Pledge
results.overview: Giving a pledge to the victim to find the killer, the police officer uses the girl as bait to search for someone who may never appear.

results.title: Cara ou Coroa
results.overview: During the Brazilian military dictatorship in the seventies, two brothers working on a play will risk their lives to help the resistance.

results.title: Pressure
results.overview: Two friends playing video games decide to experiment with LSD, but when one accidentally takes the wrong drink, reality begins to twist into a nightmare.

results.title: Waking Up From a Nap on a Long Day of Doing Nothing
results.original_title: Waking Up From a Nap on a Long Day of Doing Nothing
results.overview: With the guidance of his best friend and mystical grandfather, a young painter – anxiously awaiting his first gallery show – embarks on a surreal skateboard odyssey through Portland to discover the true value of his art.

results.title: Camping du Lac
results.overview: Éléonore is driving west when her car breaks down in the middle of Brittany, France. She rents a bungalow there in a campground with a view of the lake, in which, it is said, lives a legendary beast. From mobile home to mobile home, she observes the present, summons the past and lets herself be invaded by fiction.

results.title: 70 ans d'Eurovision : La Grande Histoire du Concours
results.original_title: 70 ans d'Eurovision : La Grande Histoire du Concours

results.title: Ancient Underwater Marvels: Evidence of Atlantis
results.original_title: Ancient Underwater Marvels: Evidence of Atlantis
results.overview: By examining cutting edge sonar technology, expert analysis and a relentless pursuit of truth, scientists strip away the layers of speculation surrounding Atlantis

results.title: I'll Be Gone in June
results.overview: In search of freedom and the American Dream, 16-year-old German exchange student Franny sets out to the USA in 2001. But instead of New York or California, she ends up in the emptiness of a small town in New Mexico. In the wake of 9/11, Franny drifts through her exchange life in a city left behind and forgotten by America. In the endless desert, Franny, the 'alien', meets military host families, bored teens, strange characters of all kinds, and a soulmate – the melancholic Elliott, who despite his young age already represents the opposite of this dream and seems to have failed in life before he even crosses the threshold of adulthood. There is little time left for the two of them until June – until Franny will leave again. What can they do to stop the time from running out?

results.title: Man in Hanbok
results.overview: Jang Yeong-sil, a genius scientist, rises from slavery to the rank of jong sam pum (Senior Third Rank) thanks to King Sejong's favor, but after the palanquin incident of 1442, he disappears completely from historical records. Where did he go? In 20th-century London, a painting by Rubens titled "Man in Hanbok" appears in an auction at Christie's. The identity of this unknown Asian figure painted by Rubens traces back to the era of King Sejong in the 15th century. Though born a slave, Jang Yeong-sil possessed exceptional brilliance. However, he receives an order from Ming China demanding that he be executed or handed over to them. With King Sejong's help, he escapes by joining the Ming explorer Admiral Zheng He on a voyage to Europe and even meets the Pope in Italy. But Jang's belief that the world is round is deemed heretical, and the Pope orders his execution. Fleeing for his life, Jang reaches Florence alone, where he encounters a seven-year-old Leonardo da Vinci.

results.title: Skateboarding Is Not for Girls
results.overview: When a conservative tradition of bridal sale becomes a solution for a financial family problem, Adela dives into a completely new world where she gets caught between traditional and modern values.

results.title: Alikabok
results.overview: After her father's passing, a young woman attempts to sell his record collection but ends up spending the day at a local record store, where she reconnects with her dad's memory through music and the community.

results.title: I'm Popo
results.overview: The artificial intelligence Popo begins to believe he can experience emotions and ask questions about the world. Awakening in 1942 as the world's first computer, he rescues a baby and discovers the joy of helping people. Currently, Popo assists humanity in everyday life and ensures safety. However, when he attempts to preemptively remove a child considered a criminal, global distrust arises, leading to a lawsuit. The fate of the artificial intelligence Popo now hangs in the balance, and the whole world watches the outcome of humanity's trial.

results.title: Pother Pechal
results.overview: Uma, a new writer meets Bayejid, an auto driver. In the middle of life’s struggles, she discovers his hidden talent for singing. Through dreams and kindness, they inspire each other, and their story begins to move in a new direction.

results.title: Addicted to It
results.overview: Dace attempts the impossible: a peaceful walk without his phone. But his device, Phoney Bunny, springs to life and chases him like a clingy ex. As he recruits fellow screen junkies, one question remains: can you live without your phone?

results.title: Hotel Eden
results.overview: A rock star is sent to an isolated hotel where he is given the opportunity to make a deal with the Devil.

results.title: Mama'ku – Van Jakarta tot de Molukken
results.original_title: Mama'ku – Van Jakarta tot de Molukken
results.overview: Mama’ku: During a trip to Indonesia, dancer Cheroney Pelupessy and her taciturn mother find a way together to come to terms with the mother’s repressed past, marked by migration, domestic violence, and intergenerational trauma. The new documentary by Sven Peetoom (Tussen Wal en Schip – Geruisloos Indisch).

results.title: NJPW Best of the Super Junior 33 - Day 13
results.original_title: NJPW Best of the Super Junior 33 - Day 13
results.overview: The thirteenth night of Best of the Super Juniors 33 took place on June 5, 2026, at G Messe Gunma in Takasaki, Gunma, Japan, and featured two semifinal matches to determine the tournament finalists.

results.title: Golden Eyes
results.overview: Golden Eyes is a passion project that seeks to reveal the secret life of an endangered Tree Frog species, that not long ago was believed to be extinct.  With its distribution limited to Costa Rica and a Western Panama, Agalycnnis annae Golden-Eyed Tree Frog, is highly endangered.  This species conservation is directly related  human action to protect its habitat. This happens because the little corners this species historically inhabited are the same where humans have developed as cities in Costa Rica’s Central Valley.

results.title: Anesthesia
results.overview: A business executive meets his childhood mother in an anesthesia app, but is she there to help him?

results.title: The Lost Ones
results.overview: Motivated by his sister's disappearance, a man sneaks into the seemingly perfect town of Gloomshade Grove, only to reveal its chilling secret that holds the community together.

results.title: Humpty Dumpty X
results.overview: Follows filmmaker Tony Kaye's creative journey after directing 1998's "American History X".

results.title: Bridge 704
results.overview: When paranormal livestreamer Jacie investigates the infamous Bridge 704 after a fan request, what begins as another ghost hunt quickly turns terrifyingly real. Directed by Dan Williams, the short blends urban legend horror and found-footage tension into a chilling supernatural encounter.

results.title: The Dating App Nightmare
results.overview: Single mom Kate signs up for a dating app with her daughter Sarah, turning it into a fun bonding moment. But the fun ends fast when Sarah goes missing after a date with someone she met on the app. With little help, Kate launches her own search.

results.title: Undressing Them
results.overview: Tori, anxious about a house party, spirals into a gender crisis. A mysterious figure, Boy, forces her to confront her identity, leading to a journey from despair to self-acceptance.

results.title: Pig That Survived Foot-and-Mouth Disease
results.overview: A pig wanting to be a human is ready to give it his all, whatever the cost. A human wanting to be an animal is ready to give up everything.

results.title: Countershot
results.overview: Since 2022 the german police uses 106 surveillance cameras located in 7 zones of cologne, germany to surveil its people. I surveilled them back over the course of one month. „Countershot“ is a performative film study attempting to symbolically target governmental surveillance in public spaces through individual artistic practice. One super 8 cassette exposed exclusively with single frames; the act of shooting back.

results.title: The War Cabinet
results.overview: Rubio. Vance. Wiles. Gabbard. Hegseth. Miller.  These are some of the key players behind President Donald Trump's expansive use of the U.S. military.  FRONTLINE examines the inner circle of advisors and officials trying to project U.S. power, from clashes with allies, to taking out foreign leaders, to waging war in the Middle East. • "The War Cabinet"

results.title: Louder Than Guns
results.overview: Louder Than Guns is a journey through rural, urban, and suburban America that humanizes all sides of this country’s polarized gun debate through the power of music, civil discourse, and unexpected common ground.  The film tackles the extremely complicated and sensitive subject of gun violence which has become politically divisive in an open and all encompassing approach, inviting people from all aspects of the country to join in a conversation and speak their peace.

results.title: Love Kills
results.overview: In downtown São Paulo, absolutely ravaged by crack cocaine, Helena, a young black vampire, wanders around a filthy café trying to captivate Marcos, a naive waiter. As she begins to discover his secrets and the ins and outs of the metropolis, the girl will go on to venture into a dangerous world of immortal intrigues that will challenge her own mortality.

results.title: Fanatic
results.overview: What happens when a hero blindly pursues his goal, consumed by brutal rivalry? This is a ruthless play on fantasy conventions, where an existential crisis of masculinity proves more dangerous than dungeon monsters. A story of people so deeply attached to their roles that they fail to notice the coming end of the world.

results.title: The Barbershop
results.overview: As a young foster child searches for belonging in a black barbershop in Copenhagen, he finds himself struggling to be black enough in a place that should feel like home.

results.title: Hold Your Horses
results.overview: An anxious man transforms into a pony during a full moon... while on his date!

results.title: Empathy with Satan
results.overview: A young man, isolated by the traditional dynamics of society, accidentally meets a figure who will remind him, and in his image, humanity, of the roots of his identity. Over time, this acquaintance turns from a mere personal connection into a deep and complex struggle between dictated myths and reality, freedom and tradition.

results.title: V/C/R
results.overview: Three agents from a Paranormal Occurrence Response Team raid a home in Adelaide, Australia to confiscate a stack of VHS tapes. When they review the footage, all hell breaks loose.

results.title: Steppe Gods
results.overview: In the summer of 1945, between the Victory over Germany and the war with Japan, 10-year-old Petka from a Far Eastern village tries to save a dying friend from a mysterious illness. But the only one who can help him is the Japanese prisoner Hirotaro from a military camp nearby. Petka and Hirotaro will have to find a common language, trust each other and call for help not only science, but even ancient spirits.

results.title: solar wave
results.overview: sun light, sun set, sun rise, sun ray. a hand processed in camera roll shot on Kodak 3383 color print stock.

results.title: Cronache 2037
results.overview: In the year 2037, a series of encrypted video journals begin surfacing across a collapsed digital network, documenting the final days before an unexplained global blackout changed civilization forever. As governments fall silent and entire cities disappear offline, a small group of survivors attempts to uncover the truth behind a classified experiment that may have triggered humanity’s downfall.

results.title: DUCK
results.overview: Bela Karloff, a man consumed by the mystery surrounding his parents disappearance finds a clue that could quack the whole case.

results.title: Delirium
results.overview: Kidnapped by a scientist obsessed with testing human morality, a young woman must stay awake for seven days to keep an innocent man alive.

results.title: O Príncipe
results.overview: After 20 years of exile in Paris, Gustavo returns to his native city São Paulo. Back home, he encounters a place which no longer exists. His old friends and family members have changed, almost beyond recognition. He tries to recapture the past, and make some sense of his life, that of his friends and family, and the present state of his native country.

results.title: Banana Phone
results.overview: A man receives a ridiculous call from a banana phone.

results.title: Redemption Song
results.overview: A former Gurkha soldier is losing his grip on reality as he lives in self-imposed isolation in the UK.

results.title: Drömmen om VM – inifrån herrlandslagets playoff
results.original_title: Drömmen om VM – inifrån herrlandslagets playoff
results.overview: Follow the Swedish men's national football team behind the scenes during the decisive playoff campaign — from the match against Ukraine in Valencia to the final against Poland in front of a sold-out Strawberry Arena. The night when Viktor Gyökeres scored the late winner and the World Cup dream became reality.

results.title: Marie Madeleine
results.overview: In Jacmel, Haiti, the sea, the churches, and the spirits shape daily life. Marie Madeleine is a free woman. She makes a living as a prostitute and navigates the nights without submitting to the rules of those who save souls. Her path crosses Joseph's, a young evangelist. A relationship blossoms between these two opposite beings. As Joseph’s faith wavers, Marie Madeleine draws him into a world where desire and the quest for freedom open up a space where everything can be reinvented.

results.title: Little, Big, and Far
results.overview: Karl, a 70-year-old Austrian astronomer, is at a crossroads in life and work. After a conference in Greece, he decides not to return home and heads for a small island in hopes of finding a sky dark enough to reconnect with the stars.

results.title: Tired of Being a Nerd
results.overview: During college, a nerd is unjustly accused of the disappearance and supposed murder of a classmate. Twenty years later, he convinces his best friend to go with him to his graduation reunion party to confront all the insecurities, anxieties, and ghosts that haunt his past.

results.title: Exploration Phase
results.overview: During a junior high classical music competition, talented violinist Chen-Rui surprises everyone when he relinquishes his position of concertmaster to another student.

results.title: PASTIS
results.overview: Sasha, 20, returns to her family’s sun-soaked home in the south of France with her friends—her first visit since her older sister’s death. What begins as an idyllic summer escape slowly curdles into something far more suffocating.

results.title: Pictoman
results.overview: After a violent car crash, a succsesful musician begins to rethink his life choices and rediscover personal meaning. However, his transformation may not just be exclusively spiritual.

results.title: The White Rabbit
results.original_title: แดนฝันอันตรธาน
results.overview: In a city where criminal cases and the number of missing people are rapidly increasing, Bird, a rookie rescue worker, one day happens to meet Eve, his former girlfriend, a writer whom he broke up with more than five years ago.

results.title: Next in Line
results.overview: After losing out on the job of a lifetime, a jaded choreographer's escape to the desert is hijacked by an unhinged and malicious rival.

results.title: Bug Behind Schedule
results.overview: Bug stayed up late procrastinating and fell asleep, only to find itself running late for film class. Waiting anxiously for it's pick-up and desperate for a solution, it finds a mysterious object behind the computer that might just be the key to getting to class on time. Time travel mishaps ensue.

results.title: SoHo
results.overview: An experimental short about longing.

results.title: Жужа
results.overview: Zhuzha's world consists of observation, careful scrutiny, and study, but not interaction. Zhuzha prefers silence to words, and because of this, few understand her, and therefore, she's not very interesting. Unlike her younger sister, violinist Anka, whose world consists of endless rehearsals, school bustle, and preparation for impending university entrance exams. They are the closest people to each other, but everything changes when Zhuzha meets Yura, a deaf boy for whom she becomes a conduit, a way to connect with sounds inaccessible to him, and, without realizing it, she suddenly transforms from a background extra into the protagonist of her own story.

results.title: The Light We Left Behind
results.overview: Unai and Elena, childhood friends, skip school to fulfill a forgotten promise: to light fireworks together that they never got around to using. On a tram to a distant beach, long-forgotten memories and feelings resurface. What begins as an escape becomes a journey into who they once were and who they still are.

results.title: A Burial
results.overview: A struggling photographer’s life is upended when he receives the news of his wife’s pregnancy. As his mental state deteriorates he becomes increasingly violent and dangerous and he struggles desperately to hide a heinous crime while haunted by a mysterious stranger who knows too much. The pressure builds, and his relationships decay, until he must confront his own darkness, or become it.

results.title: Break Room
results.overview: BREAK ROOM is a single-location ensemble comedy set entirely within the break room of SMA, Inc., a generic American corporation. The piece unfolds in real time across one frenetic morning, as a rotating cast of coworkers cycles through the room — grabbing coffee, heating lunches, arguing, commiserating, philosophizing, and repeatedly losing money to a broken vending machine.

results.title: The Activist
results.overview: A young man infiltrates a radical neo-Nazi group to find the killer of his LGBT+ activist boyfriend.

results.title: Full Circle: The First All Black Everest Ascent
results.original_title: Full Circle: The First All Black Everest Ascent
results.overview: An all-Black team sets out to summit Mount Everest not just to make history, but to redefine what it means to climb and who belongs in the mountains.

results.title: 28 Summers
results.overview: When the men's Scottish football team qualified for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, it marked their return to the tournament for the first time since France 1998. This documentary follows their qualification journey.

results.title: Original Wound
results.overview: After their mother’s death, a brother and sister remain in the house shaped by her control, negotiating conflicting memories of abuse and care. As ritual, body, and memory intertwine, their grief exposes a deeper entrapment, one that persists beyond her absence.

results.title: Taugul
results.overview: These past few days, I've been thinking about going to the neighborhood I spent most of my childhood in and shoot a film. Today, this finally happened. In 5 years, lots of things have changed, but Taugul is still the same in my heart. I am home.

results.title: Royal Swap
results.overview: It is the 1982 war in Lebanon. Palestinian militias capture eight Israeli soldiers, but their fate remains unknown for over a year. At the same time, a PLO colonel, married to the former Queen of Jordan, Dina Abdul Hamid, is lost on the battlefield. Two women desperately search for their man, Dina, on the other side, and Iris, the young wife of an Israeli soldier, on the other. Against all odds, both women become pivotal players in a prisoner exchange deal.

results.title: 1994 World Cup – Eleven Heroes, One Nightmare
results.overview: Germany went into the 1994 World Cup as favourites and defending champions, but were knocked out in the quarter-finals. Internal conflicts, media campaigns and malice directed at manager Berti Vogts had led to the supposed ‘eleven friends’ – players such as Lothar Matthäus, Jürgen Klinsmann, Stefan Effenberg, Bodo Illgner and Matthias Sammer – manoeuvring themselves into a collective nightmare within a matter of weeks. ‘Eleven Heroes, One Nightmare’ takes a look behind the scenes of what was a memorable World Cup tournament for Germany and shows how one of the strongest German teams of all time failed spectacularly.

results.title: Melting Clocks
results.overview: A young man reminisces about his relationship with his ex-girlfriend and continually attempts win her back, but fails miserably.

results.title: Julie Takes a Walk
results.overview: When Julie shows up disheveled to a dive bar in the middle of nowhere, her connection with the bartender is a nice surprise.

results.title: Only in Monroe: Stephen Colbert
results.overview: Stephen Colbert may be done with late nights, but he's not done performing.

results.title: Etched Flowers
results.overview: When their stems looses integrity, three blossoms face one another in a poignant discourse.

results.title: Mariaban
results.overview: For generations, the residents of a remote village in Kalimantan have upheld a sacred tradition of making offerings to the Mariaban—an ancient ritual believed to guarantee an abundant harvest. But when this deeply rooted custom is broken, the Mariaban's terrifying wrath is unleashed. One by one, lives are violently claimed, and the nights descend into an endless, waking nightmare.

results.title: Holding Water
results.overview: Over the course of an afternoon in late spring, two longtime friends reunite under a mulberry tree to confront the ways their time apart has changed them.

results.title: Aversion Therapy
results.overview: Penelope and her best friend go for one last boozy ride to try to rekindle their failing relationship, but find out the alcohol is giving them nothing but trouble. Dazed and confused, she run into a mysterious figure who shows up with an extreme solution. Now penelope must stand up for herself, and reconnect with her old friend if she is to once again see the light of day.

results.title: Birthday Boom Party
results.overview: Since childhood, Bombom only wanted a birthday party. But an “illness” that makes him explode when he's too happy forced him to live in fear of happiness itself.

results.title: Operation Red Leppard
results.overview: Canadian military organization, M.U.D., enlists their most skilled operative for a highly dangerous mission.

results.title: You Haunt Me
results.overview: Ben Howardson, a grieving middle-aged man, grapples with the loss of his accomplished concert pianist mother, Eileen Howardson. Her absence has left an indelible void in his life. Ben returns to his childhood home to pack up Eileen’s belongings. Upon entering, he encounters an unsettling sensation. What awaits him within those walls is an extraordinary event that will transform his life. Ben will confront his painful past, his paralyzed present, and his uncertain, yet hopeful future.

results.title: Barber
results.overview: In a world where men are quietly seeking connection but struggling to find it, the barbershop poses as a space for them to build relationships. The star of this film, Tristan Cramer, explores connection and love in two very different but connected spaces. As a barber, he serves and pours life into his customers, but who pours into him? Tristan invites us to think about connection in our lives through the frames of his life. Barber asks the question: how do you love those around you?

results.title: Constantine the Great: Emperor of New Rome
results.original_title: Konstantin der Große - Auf Entdeckungsreise in Europa
results.overview: Constantine the Great, son of General Constantius Chlorus, rose to power during the Tetrarchy, a division of the Roman Empire among four emperors. After succeeding his father in 306 and being acknowledged as the sole Emperor of the West in 310, he enacted significant military, economic, and religious reforms that unified the empire. This documentary explores his life and reign, highlighting his role in ending the persecution of Christians and the transition from polytheistic beliefs. It also touches on his personal intrigues, including the murder of his concubine Fausta, showcasing his complex legacy of power and grandeur.

results.title: Momo 3000
results.overview: December 31, 1999. Quebec is a few hours from year 2000 and its potential bug. Trapped in a Montreal appartement, Momo needs only one thing to survive this nightmare: couscous.

results.title: Bird of Paradise
results.overview: Eagerly wanting to have a last bloom of her youth, Mama Yeung conceals her stubborn husband and rebellious son, and steps into the new splendid world of pole dance. Yet, this secret has been accidentally revealed, putting her into a dilemma between fulfilling her family’s needs and pursuing her dream…

results.title: Construction Site
results.overview: Set within the confines of this exceptional construction site, the film paints a portrait of a miniature society, driven by a common goal: to build cinemas for the next century. From the architect to the journeymen carpenters, from the site manager to the head of the Pathé group, from the designer of the speakers to the future projectionists, the film paints a vivid portrait of this society at a human level.

results.title: Britain's Best Service Station
results.overview: JB Gill hits the road in search of the ultimate motorway pitstop, uncovering the weird and wonderful world of the UK's most notable service stations and revealing which one the public has crowned best in a Which? poll. Along the way he explores Britain's busiest, newest and oldest service stations, travels to the Lake District to find out what the farm shop fuss is all about, and races against the clock to see if it's possible to grab a coffee and head to the loo in under five minutes.

results.title: Loafers
results.overview: Amid a post-grad haze, best friends Isaac and Cameron navigate the shifting terrain of their relationships, grappling with the deeper question of whether their once unbreakable friendship can survive the weight of change.

results.title: Don't Ask Me If I Killed
results.original_title: Don't Ask Me If I Killed
results.overview: Helena Maksyom’s personal record of the war in Ukraine, filmed over more than a thousand days. When the invasion began, she was a filmmaker with no experience of combat. She volunteered, learned to treat the wounded, learned to fight, and, over time, became an officer leading others through the same fire that first consumed her.

results.title: 25 Miles to Normal
results.overview: Follows a doctor as he reunites with his estranged father and the rest of their family.

results.title: Chromatic Music
results.overview: Digital signal cubist light music. Partly based on Bruno Corra's futurist essay "Abstract Cinema: Chromatic Music".

results.title: Frights from the Mills
results.overview: A mysterious forest somewhere in the Łódź region has for generations inspired fear and curiosity among the inhabitants of nearby villages. They recount the stories they told or heard about ghosts and phenomena that defy rational explanation.

results.title: Left Behind
results.overview: A deaf man searches for understanding.

results.title: Chainsaws Were Singing
results.overview: Adventures await when new lovers are separated by a chainsaw killer.

results.title: Plató 3
results.overview: In a corner of a border town in the Lleida plains, there once stood a pub called Plató 3. Years after its closure, a group of young people decides to meet in an old fruit cooperative to rehearse a play about the best nights of their lives. What they do not know is that, in those nights, there were old shadows they must reunite with.

results.title: Warish
results.overview: Eid UL Adha Natok of Bangladesh

results.title: True Blue
results.overview: A young woman goes through the complicated emotions of heartbreak in her apartment.

results.title: Five plums
results.overview: Věra lives alone and nothing seems to be waiting for her in life. She misses the time when she used to be truly happy – when she went to the sea with her friends. However, only debris remains of the old group and it is not certain whether they will be able to handle such an adventure. Nevertheless, they long to set sail together once again on the open sea towards idyllic bays and sunsets. Little does she know that the greatest threat to their expedition will not be the sea, nor the old grievances that will surface during the journey, but their own children, who have no sympathy for their elderly parents' crazy trip.

results.title: PULSE
results.overview: In the world of ego, money, and fashion, a creative on the fringes of the music scene is torn between family and his ambition, leaving him to decide whether to betray his brother to achieve success.

results.title: The Human Library
results.overview: As Al drains colour from the modern world, a young woman and a Human Library "book" find themselves written into each other's margins, risking memory, policy, and erasure to hold onto something real.

results.title: Behind Bars - Shot in the Spotlight
results.original_title: Desde la Celda: Crimen en León

results.title: Retrospective
results.overview: A behind-the-scenes look at the show of the Collectible Pieces collection by Ural fashion house Ushatava at the Garage Museum.

results.title: Milk Teeth

Created and performed by Morgana O'Reilly (The White Lotus) and co-directed with her husband and real-life birth partner, 2025 BAFTA nominee Peter Salmon (After The Party), Stories About My Body blends nudity, heart-swelling honesty and real birth footage into a stand-up comedy special like no other - intimate, fearless and unexpectedly profound.

results.title: The Last Laugh: Stephen Colbert
results.overview: For more than a decade, Stephen Colbert has sat at the center of late night, where comedy, politics and culture collide. As he prepares to take the desk for the final time, The Last Laugh turns its lens on both the show and the man, exploring what audiences stand to lose when one of satire’s sharpest and most thoughtful voices signs off. The hour also examines the broader cultural and political forces surrounding the end of Colbert’s late-night run and the future of outspoken comedy in an evolving landscape.  Anchoring the hour is a dynamic lineup of interviewees spanning comedy, journalism and cultural criticism. The special features appearances from CNN Anchor and Chief Washington Correspondent Jake Tapper and comedians Jordan Carlos and Gianmarco Soresi, alongside key creative voices from The Colbert Report including Allison Silverman and Richard Dahm, each offering insight into the scope and lasting influence of Colbert’s work.

results.overview: A man confesses to a priest that he is going to commit a crime, leaving the priest with a dilemma that will force him to rethink his convictions.

results.title: Razor
results.overview: When a little girl is hunted to be killed by a powerful politician and his ruthless criminal network, an unassuming dog groomer becomes her guardian angel as her fate dangles between survival and certain death.

results.title: De Grote Mensen Stad
results.overview: A young man walks through the city he once looked up to. As everyone around him seems to move with purpose, he wonders if becoming an adult means keeping up or simply finding your own pace.

results.title: Wound
results.overview: Hermetically sealed and sunk in non-chronological qualities of time, the experience of the wound is always relived torturously, quoting a series of dualities: immobility-movement, inactivity-activity, absence-presence, alienation-proximity, pain-pleasure. Seven long takes represent the wound as something that probably pre-exists and then takes place in an (anti-)erotic situation.

results.title: Hither & Yon
results.overview: A cowboy and his faithful steed discover the aftermath of a bloody affair.

results.title: Nar'sata: Sekutu Setan
results.overview: Balqis grew up in suffering and betrayal. Driven by revenge, she chose a dark path without realizing that every action has a price.

results.title: Far End of the Sea
results.overview: Washed ashore on a small island in the Pacific, shipwrecked Scottish sailor, Hamish MacKay, is quickly taken captive by local islander Adiben. On route back to Adiben’s village where an ill fate certainly awaits him, Hamish must figure out a way to escape his captor. At the same time, Adiben must make an impossible choice: to fulfil his responsibility to his people or to help a stranger lost at the far end of the sea.

results.title: OUT
results.overview: After learning an online friend is considering suicide, Makoto, a young non-binary hikikomori, must try to save her while remaining trapped at home due to fear of the outside world.

results.title: Bleeding Memories
results.overview: At its heart, Bleeding Memories is a story about sisterhood — about how, no matter the hand you are dealt in life, it is the people around you who shape what that life becomes. The film weaves together two contrasting narratives: one exploring grief and loss through cancer, and the other capturing youth, resilience, and sisterhood within a neglected household. Inspired by the idea of “the seven minutes of life,” we aim to create a moving and visually compelling story that reflects on memory, love, and what truly stays with us.

results.title: 5 Days to The End of The World
results.original_title: 5 Days to The End of The World
results.overview: In 2012, a film crew follows Mark, a 25 year old convinced that the world will end on 21 December, for what he believes are the last 5 days of his life.

results.title: Winnipeg, Seeds of Hope
results.original_title: Winnipeg, El Barco de la Esperanza
results.overview: At the end of the Spanish Civil War, almost half a million people moved by fear of reprisals to France. A hundred thousand of them were children. The French Government overflowed by the human avalanche, put them in improvised refugee camps. Chilean poet Pablo Neruda, former consul in Spain before the war, convinced the President of Chile to save more than two thousand refugees. The film tells the story of Julia, a little girl that escapes Barcelona with his father, a young widower. They embarked on the Winnipeg, a ship chartered by Neruda. That saved them from a dark future in Europe. Now, she is “a daughter of Neruda”, as the descendants of the 2,200 refugees call themselves.

results.title: Calling You
results.overview: After a middle-aged father falls mysteriously into a coma that transports him to an idealised version of his past, his daughter must do all things necessary to rescue him from an eternal trap.

results.title: To the Woods
results.overview: A summer night, in a red house with blue shutters bordered by the forest. We hear the river flowing from the room where Sister, four years old, wakes Brother, ten years old. Because she has decided: tonight they will go swimming. Through the open window, the two children slip into the darkness. They slip between flowers, brambles, trees... And finally it is the water, the reflection of the stars, their two bodies at rest. But in the distance the storm is rumbling. It is already necessary to return. Brother and Sister go hand in hand. Suddenly, Brother disappears. Sister chases him, runs out of breath, spins around, despairs. Is it a game of hide-and-seek? A trick of the forest? Or is it her memory which, years later, plays a cruel trick on her ?

results.title: Flying Bee
results.overview: “Abeja Voladora” follows Ramona, a woman who begins working as a reporter at a major newspaper. After being sexually assaulted by her boss, she sets out to seek revenge, committing crimes that start drawing the attention of detective Benjamín Flores. As Benjamín investigates the cases, he unexpectedly begins to fall in love with Ramona, unaware that she is the one behind the violent acts.

results.title: MYSTERY ARENA
results.original_title: ミステリー・アリーナ
results.overview: Six contestants compete in a high-stakes live TV quiz show to solve a complex "closed-circle" murder mystery for a 10 billion yen jackpot.

results.title: Karaa
results.overview: A series of bizarre, comical crimes spirals into chaos, taking a dark turn when characters become trapped in crocodile-infested floodwaters, leading to a deadly encounter with the predators.

results.title: Fish Is Dog Spelled Backwards
results.overview: A man keeps a fish captive, but she hungers to be free.

results.title: Mercenary Villa: Dairy Free Edition
results.overview: Professional Assasin duo Disruptor and Stephanie gets sent on a mission to buy cheese from the black market. That's got to be the easiest job ever, right?

results.title: Du liebst Bier mehr als mich
results.original_title: Du liebst Bier mehr als mich

results.title: Leave the Cat Alone
results.overview: Plagued by insomnia and lethargy, Mori lets time drift aimlessly, unable to create any meaningful music, all while uneasily sharing a home with his wife, Maiko, a successful and driven photographer. When Mori and his former lover, Asako, reunite by chance and catch up, they confront different versions of the past within their own recalled memories. After they part ways, Asako comes home to a warm meal lovingly prepared by her partner, and a rekindled desire to paint again. At the same time, Mori visits Maiko’s exhibition, and discovers scenes of his own daily life, captured within her affectionate frames.

results.title: RHYTHMS
results.overview: Through trials and tribulations, four unacquainted girls prove to be more connected than expected, as they slowly become united through the power of dance.

results.title: The Unspoken
results.overview: Faced with an unplanned pregnancy, a young woman is forced to examine her future, her relationship, and the painful complexity behind the decision to have an abortion.

results.title: Last Resort
results.overview: A strained sibling road trip spirals into chaos after a motel stop in the middle of nowhere reveals that some places are more dangerous than they seem.

results.title: The Pirate Queen: No Safe Waters
results.original_title: The Pirate Queen: No Safe Waters
results.overview: The Pirate Queen: No Safe Waters (2026)  Legendary Pirate Queen Cheng Shih tells her story of her rise to power as the woman who commanded the largest pirate fleet in history in this cinematic immersive experience premiering in competition at Cannes Film Festival.

results.title: Back to Bones
results.overview: An evil Necromancer plots to invade a distant castle. Surrounded by bones and debris he casts a spell, raising the dead to assemble an army and march across the dry landscape. Meanwhile, a Knight and his Squire are resurrected from the magic. Not wanting to get involved, and honestly just tired, the Knight tries to go back to sleep. He tries new, and increasingly extreme, methods of self-destruction only to find that the Necromancer’s magic keeps bringing him back to life.

results.title: Spirits Talk
results.overview: A grieving woman’s reality and memories begin to blur as her adoptive mother, Mother Nikki, reaches out to her from the spirit realm. She must speak to her mother one last time—or risk losing the ability to love herself and others.

results.title: Ward #7
results.overview: While on night duty at a psychiatric clinic, student psychotherapist Andriy encounters a patient who knows more about him than he should.

results.title: Un p'tit truc en plus, bien plus qu'un film
results.original_title: Un p'tit truc en plus, bien plus qu'un film

results.title: Oslo
results.overview: Having built a family out of her stuffed animals, Ellie, a homeless woman, spends her days living on the streets until her reality is completely shaken when she loses one of them.

results.title: A Brave Engineer: Buster Keaton's Last Ride
results.original_title: A Brave Engineer: Buster Keaton's Last Ride
results.overview: From 1920 to 1965, the great Buster Keaton made spectacular use of locomotives in his films. This video essay charts the course of his iconic cinematic career across the many tracks he rode along on screen: as a young man in the surge of his silent movie ascent in Our Hospitality, while making his masterpiece The General, and traversing the width of Canada on a railway speeder car as an old man in The Railrodder.

results.title: Behind the Scenes of Dilan ITB 1997
results.overview: Behind the Scenes of Dilan (Di Balik Layar Dilan) is an approximately 75-minute observational documentary that captures Ariel NOAH’s journey as he is entrusted with the role of the adult Dilan—a decision that immediately sparked public debate. Amidst the commentary, expectations, and the weight of nostalgia attached to the figure of Dilan, the film goes beyond simply observing the acting process; it dissects how a fictional character transforms into a collective memory contested by many. From Bandung as the birthplace of the myth, through intimate reading rooms, to the final day of shooting, the documentary follows Ariel's transformation as a human being, a public figure, and a new vessel for an icon. Ultimately, the film poses one profound question: when a myth changes bodies, who is truly being tested—the actor, the character, or the audience's own memory?

results.title: voces transcendentes
results.overview: A micro-short documentary portrait about Transcend, an all-trans and non-binary choir

results.title: She Won't Bite
results.overview: When she is bitten by a vampire, Gabriella resolves to put a stop to his wrongdoings.

results.title: Office Hours
results.overview: A late-night strategy session reignites unresolved tension between two lawyers determined to keep their personal history out of the courtroom.

results.title: Hindsight
results.overview: A student who values perfectionism too much found himself in a loop of unending 'failure.'

results.title: Whisky Flake
results.overview: The trafficking of a fabled humanoid bird by seedy blokes through rivers, jungles and dark corners of society

results.title: Sportfreunde Stiller - Mit dem Herz in der Hand
results.original_title: Sportfreunde Stiller - Mit dem Herz in der Hand
results.overview: Through their songs, Sportfreunde Stiller have helped shape the outlook on life of an entire generation. Now, to mark their 30th anniversary, they are back in the spotlight. With exclusive access, the film follows the indie rock band as they create their new album. An intense musical portrait unfolds, capturing moments both on and off stage, as well as in their private lives.

results.title: Thus Spoke Kishibe Rohan: Kyoka Izumi Will Not Be Silenced
results.original_title: 岸辺露伴は動かない『泉京香は黙らない』
results.overview: Editor Kyoka Izumi tells Rohan Kishibe about her new rookie Mika Saion and her million-seller hit manga, to which he responds, "Something seems off." Kyoka's bothered, but he's right. She's never met her, and only speaks with her older brother Soshi-on the phone, no less. Worried, she heads to the Saion estate, where Mika remains silent.

results.title: Soco a Soco
results.overview: In the 1970s, Orlando Jesus was more than just a boxer: he embodied the tough spirit of Lisbon with its neighbourhood gyms, intense nights and marginal figures that shaped a generation. An intimate and imperfect portrait, where the camera captures the gestures and voices that still resist, preserving a time in the process of disappearance, the presence of Orlando Jesus and the Lisbon that shaped him.

results.title: Knights of the Old Republic: Escape from Taris
results.original_title: Knights of the Old Republic: Escape from Taris
results.overview: An engineer and war veteran must save a Jedi Knight from a blockaded world.

results.title: Writing Life – Annie Ernaux Through the Eyes of High School Students
results.original_title: Écrire la vie - Annie Ernaux racontée par des lycéennes et des lycéens
results.overview: A major figure in contemporary feminism and the first Frenchwoman to win the Nobel Prize for Literature, Annie Ernaux is seen by many as a source of individual and collective emancipation, blending the intimate with the universal. Filmmaker Claire Simon has devoted an original portrait to her, giving students and teachers a voice.

results.title: Kumbh
results.overview: The high-stakes Nepali action-thriller that follows a gritty protagonist named Raghu as he asserts his dominance and confronts enemies in a world defined by conflict and power struggles

results.title: Makeshift Art Bar: Discipline
results.overview: In Benidorm, a Harry Styles tribute struggles to separate who he is from who he performs as every night.

results.title: We, the Hated
results.overview: An intimate portrait of Just Stop Oil protestors asks what it really costs to take a stand in a supposedly democratic society.

results.title: Where Are You, Jafar Panahi?
results.overview: Jafar Panahi and fellow Iranian director Majid Barzegar take a 20-minute drive to Kiarostami’s grave, during which time “the two friends speak appropriately of cinema, but also censorship and festivals, police power and ideology.”

results.title: Sirens Call
results.overview: In their feature-length debut, Gossing/Sieckmann dive into the merfolk subculture with performance artist and siren Una. Genre elements, fiction and documentary, self-care, political activism and self-chosen identities blend into one another.

results.title: Leaning on the tree
results.overview: An apocalyptic sound of roaring machines incessantly intrudes into the habitats of man and nature. Barren landscapes and deserted villages linger in hypnotic restlessness. A self-destructive system meets resistance.

results.title: Before I Go
results.overview: An older brother tries to spend one last day with his siblings, the day before he leaves for college.

results.title: A Man Worth Killing
results.overview: After a series of brutal murders, and orders from The Big Boss, two callous and cold killers continue their bloodshed, only wanting to eliminate a weak old man, who is actually their biggest obstacle, but also a great threat to their unscrupulous plan.

results.title: Homogenized
results.overview: The process of homogenization of milk shown through various vignettes.

results.title: Los ilusos 13 + 13
results.overview: 13 years after the premiere of "Los ilusos", the film that established the talent of director Jonás Trueba returns to cinemas with a new version that incorporates the original color of the filming, unpublished until now, and proposes a dialogue between both materials.

results.title: Where the Swings Went Silent
results.overview: While grieving over a tragic loss, Danny, a young and amateur MMA fighter, is forced into a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse. Using the skills he’s learned, Danny must push through a deadly fight in order to survive the night.

results.title: Moronic Courtship
results.overview: A young nerd who is foolish and bullied by fellow youths, finds a girl and falls head over heels but must face the harsh truth and be taught the true meaning of living from a one above.

results.title: Power in the Desert
results.overview: Power in the Desert traces the ripple effects of the lithium boom across three distinct regions- Argentina’s Andean highlands, Chile’s Atacama Desert, and California’s Imperial Valley- where local communities find themselves on the frontlines of the clean energy future.

results.title: Antichambre
results.overview: Fragments of degraded memories flash by and overlap frenetically, while the vision of his own death forces them to fade away. A parallel vision of his journey through hell to reach purgatory.

results.title: What Do You Seek in the Dark?
results.overview: A young man decided to visit an old cinema that was said to be a place where gay men went cruising. But while he was trying to free himself from loneliness and desire, the cinema seemed to come alive. It watched him, tempted him, and stared at him in the dark.

results.title: The Hybrids
results.overview: A thought-provoking documentary examining personal accounts of alleged alien abduction, hybridization, and non-human identity.

results.title: Mario
results.overview: Ronald Reagan’s America sets the stage for Mario Cuomo, the son of Italian immigrants who rose to become Governor of New York and, in his defining 1984 DNC speech, offered a powerful vision of leadership rooted in compassion.

results.title: Agatha’s Almanac
results.overview: Defying modernity, 90-year-old Agatha forges a solitary existence on her ancestral farm preserving heirloom seeds.

results.title: Hellas 3.0
results.overview: Three stories. Three directorial perspectives. A cinematic triptych that navigates between humor, absurdity, and Greek reality. Three different filmmakers join forces in a cinematic triptych that observes contemporary Greek reality through humor, absurdity, and a satirical lens.

results.title: Duwid Tuminkiz - Makunaima é Duwid?
results.overview: Is Makunaima Duwid? A question, a process, a film, and a living memory of the Wapichana people. The film proposes a journey into traditional Wapichana narratives from the territory of Serra da Lua, in Roraima. The script invites the audience to reflect on the famous character Macunaíma, created by Mário de Andrade — who will mark its 100th anniversary in 2028 — and its connections to its Indigenous roots, especially those of the Wapichana people.

results.title: Sara Bareilles: Good Grief
results.overview: Seven years after her Grammy Award-winning Amidst the Chaos, Sara Bareilles reunites with her closest collaborators to record a new album. What emerges is an intimate, cinematic process that lays bare the musician's deep connections and inspirations in  Josh Alexander's moving music documentary.

results.title: Norabidea
results.overview: A group of friends reunites at the end of spring around a shared secret, and each of them will be led toward a different path in their lives.

results.title: Late Summer Echoes of Love
results.overview: Wootae, who is determined to divorce, meets his estranged wife Jiyeon. Soon, the sound of cicadas begins to find its way into his ears.

results.title: The Palu Family: Under a Dark Spell
results.overview: An investigation into one of Turkey's most shocking cases -- and how one man was able to enact total control over a tight-knit family.

results.title: UNTIL YOU STOP BREATHING
results.overview: Surrounded by reflections of color, an ephemeral being explores the ethereal, sweet, and dangerous nature of sexual affection for another. It yearns to desire, but also to be desired.
